title: watermelon play simulator 2
description: Play Watermelon Play Simulator 2 in minecraft!
body:
# English version (英文版)

This mod can let you play Watermelon Play Simulator 2 in minecraft!

This mod added some blocks and items.

And, if you find a "DGstart" in "Dige's house (it's like a house in village)", you can start your Watermelon Play Simulator 2 tour!

It will have 20 levels and 3 skills in chapter 1!

If you just want to relax, this mod also can help you.

You can find the building with iron blocks. However, the iron block isn't real, but you can smelt it in a furnace to get a big iron nugget, and a big iron nugget can be decomposed. Then you can get 3 iron nuggets.

If you have "not real block processor", you can get more from "not real iron block". You only need to put a "not real iron block" and an experience, you can get an iron ingot! As we know, we need 9 iron nuggets to craft an iron ingot, so you can get thrice items in "not real block processor".

This mod also makes getting diamond easier. You can get less diamond nuggets and less experiences when you win any level. You can make a big diamond nugget from 9 diamond nuggets and make a diamond from 9 big diamond nuggets.

Other features:

1.If you want to build with iron block but you don't have iron block, you can build with "not real iron block".

2.You can use "not real block processor" to let a villager become a "shop", and you can buy things with the item about diamond and experience.

3.You can make experience block with 9 experiences. The experience block can use for decoration and craft experience bottle.

4.This mod made by MCreator.

# 中文版 (Chinese version)

这个模组可以让你在Minecraft里面玩西瓜play模拟器2！

这个模组加入了很多方块与物品。

如果你在迪哥小屋（它就像村庄里的房子）里面找到了DG关卡启动器，你就可以开始你的西瓜play模拟器2之旅！

在第1章里，这个模组将会有20个关卡与3个技能！

如果你只是想休闲一下，这个模组也能帮你。

在野外，你能找到用铁块制成的建筑。然而，这种铁块不是真的，但是你能在熔炉里烧炼它并得到一个大铁粒。接下来，你可以把一个大铁粒分解成3个铁粒。

如果你有虚假方块处理器，你可以从虚假铁块里面得到更多。你只需要放入1个虚假铁块和1个经验，你就能得到一个铁锭！我们都知道，一个铁锭需要9个铁粒来合成，所以你能从虚假方块处理器里获得3倍的物资！

这个模组也让获取钻石变得更加简单。只要你胜利了一个关卡，你就可以获得少量钻石粒与少量经验。你可以用9个钻石粒合成一个大钻石粒，用9个大钻石粒合成一个钻石。

其他功能：

1.如果你想使用铁块来建筑，但是你没有铁块，那么你可以用仿制铁块建筑。

2.你可以使用虚假方块处理器让一个村民变成“商店”，用钻石与经验相关物品从他那里购买东西。

3.你可以使用9个经验合成一个经验块。经验块可以用作装饰，也可以合成附魔之瓶。

4.本模组使用MCreator制作。
